M-027.NAME: token-blacklist
M-027.owns: Redis-based JWT token revocation for logout and incident response with graceful degradation when Redis is unavailable

exports.fn-blacklist-token: Adds a token to the Redis blacklist with TTL matching its expiry
exports.fn-is-token-blacklisted: Checks if a token has been revoked
exports.fn-verify-token-with-blacklist: Verifies token validity and checks blacklist in one call

M-027.hotspot: H-011: Token blacklist depends on Redis availability — graceful degradation must not break auth when Redis is down
